burialPlace.address: St Mary Churchyard, Hutton, Somerset, England,

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Biography
Robert 'the Saxon' FitzMaldred, Lord Raby married Isabel Neville, daughter of Geoffrey de Neville and Emma de Bulmer. Robert 'the Saxon' FitzMaldred, Lord Raby was born circa 1160 at of Raby, Durham, England. He died before 1253.

Family
Isabel Neville b. c 1175, d. May 1254

Child
Geoffrey de Neville, Sheriff of Northumberland+ b. c 1200, d. a 1258

Robert Fitz Maldred; came of age 1195; feudal Lord Raby, Commissioner to collect an aid (irregular tax) in Northumberland 1230, served in Henry III's campaign against Welsh Aug 1241. 

A Saxon, Lord of Raby, Brancepeth and Durham, who on March 17, 1227 gave 200 marks for his release on succession to her inheritance in Yorkshire, Lincolnshire and Durham. He held several civil offices and had military service. His death date is unknown but he must of been a very old man dying between June 24, 1242 and May 25, 1248 when his widow married Gilbert de Brakenberg.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby於1170年5月18日出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比時，他的父親Maldred FitzDolphin Lord of Raby40歲，母親Joan de Stuteville30歲。他於1213年與Isabel de Neville在英國英格蘭達勒姆布朗加斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1248年5月26日在他的家鄉享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特赫頓聖 瑪麗 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby was born on 18 May 1170, in Raby, Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, Maldred FitzDolphin Lord of Raby, was 40 and his mother, Joan de Stuteville, was 30. He married Isabel de Neville in 1213, in Brancepeth, Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 26 May 1248, in his hometown, at the age of 78, and was buried in St Mary Churchyard, Hutton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby est né le 18 mai 1170, à Raby, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Maldred FitzDolphin Lord of Raby, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Joan de Stuteville, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Neville en 1213, à Brancepeth, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 mai 1248, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary Churchyard, Hutton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Mai 1170 in Raby, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maldred FitzDolphin Lord of Raby 40 und seine Mutter Joan de Stuteville 30. Er hat 1213 in Brancepeth, Durham, England, United Kingdom Isabel de Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. Mai 1248 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Mary Churchyard, Hutton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.St Mary Churchyard, Hutton, Somerset, En: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 후턴 스트 메리 처르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby(이)가 1170년 5월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maldred FitzDolphin Lord of Raby(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Stuteville(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1213년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 브랜스프스에서 Isabel de Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1248년 5월 26일 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 후턴 스트 메리 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

ru.St Mary Churchyard, Hutton, Somerset, En: ст мэри чурчярд, хуттон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby родился 18 мая 1170 г. в местности раби, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Maldred FitzDolphin Lord of Raby было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Stuteville, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Neville в 1213 г. в местности брансепет, дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 мая 1248 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри чурчярд, хуттон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
